summary: Iteration 84: Tested expanded Star Chart cultures (20 total) and Sacred Texts Audiobook Reader (15 texts). Fixed critical import bug in sacred_texts.py. All backend tests pass (18/18). Frontend Sacred Texts page working with 15 text cards, search, chapter list. Navigation Explore dropdown contains Sacred Texts and Myths & Legends links.

fixed.issue: Wrong import path for LlmChat and OpenAITextToSpeech
fixed.fix: Changed 'from emergentintegrations.llm import LlmChat' to 'from emergentintegrations.llm.chat import LlmChat, UserMessage' and 'from emergentintegrations.llm import OpenAITextToSpeech' to 'from emergentintegrations.llm.openai import OpenAITextToSpeech'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Star Chart cultures expanded to 20 (8 original + 12 new). Sacred Texts page at /sacred-texts has 15 texts with 5 chapters each. Chapter generation uses AI (LlmChat) and works without auth. Navigation Explore dropdown contains Sacred Texts and Myths & Legends links. Creation Stories page at /creation-stories has dual tabs (Creation Stories and Myths & Legends) working correctly.
